concepts_used.title: 最小生成树（Prim、Kruskal）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用欧拉回路/路径（Euler Circuit/Path）来最小化重复边遍历，从而在路径上高效搜索。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In situations where the individual stayed on the path, we aimed to maximize efficiency by minimizing redundant edge traversal through the use of Euler Circuits and Paths.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文详细列出了多个假设，包括手电筒照明范围、步行速度、搜索时间、地形可通行性、路径宽度等，并给出了合理性论证。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions and Justifications ... we determined that the pen light flashlight has the ability to illuminate a circle with a radius of five feet. ... The average person walks at 4 miles per hour, and the time allotted for the search is two hours.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过改变搜索时间、步行速度等参数，计算了不同场景下找到物体的概率，并给出了四个场景的确定性百分比。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We established 100%, 100%, 70.46%, and 2.21% certainty that our object would be found for each of the four scenarios.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用 Adobe Photoshop 的磁性套索工具和直方图工具计算公园面积，并进行了图像处理以确定搜索区域。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We computed the area by importing the image into Adobe Photoshop, and using the magnetic lasso tool to outline the yellow portion of the park, excluding the water and surroundings.

concepts_used.title: 三人分工模型
concepts_used.how_used: 论文结构清晰，分工明确，分别处理 B1 和 B2 两个子问题，并整合了不同搜索策略。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In our paper, we have split the problem into two sections, B1 and B2. Problem B1 refers to the search for a small object in Hopkinton State Park, and Problem B2 refers to the problem of finding a jogger on Fort Ord Public Land.
